Klein Moretti.hair_style: medium-length, slightly tousled and swept back with loose strands falling over the forehead
Klein Moretti.build: lean, slim but with defined shoulders
Klein Moretti.face_description: handsome young man with a sharp jawline, slightly narrowed confident brown eyes, strong brow ridge, straight nose, thin lips with a subtle smirk; refined scholarly features with a pale complexion and faint shadows under the eyes
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s pale young man with tousled black hair swept back, wearing a long black Victorian overcoat draped cape-style over shoulders revealing deep purple lining, dark waistcoat over white dress shirt with dark cravat/tie, brown leather cross-body holster strap with visible buckle, dark trousers
Klein Moretti.color_palette: black, deep purple, white, dark brown leather, charcoal gray
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; originally had brown eyes (not black); wears glasses as Zhou Mingrui; has eye bags and hint of double chin in original form; frequently shapeshifts into alternate identities (Sherlock Moriarty, Gehrman Sparrow, Dwayne Dantès, Merlin Hermes); Mythical Creature (formerly Human); resurrected 6 times
Klein Moretti.accessories: brown leather cross-body holster strap with metal buckle, long black overcoat worn cape-style with purple satin lining, dark cravat or narrow tie
Klein Moretti.faction: Tarot Club (Major Arcana) / Church of the Fool
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Mentioned wearing cheap formal attire, a tuxedo, a short-crowned top hat (half top hat style), and carrying a silver-inlaid black cane.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: long black Victorian overcoat (cape-draped with purple lining), dark charcoal waistcoat, white dress shirt, dark cravat/tie, brown leather cross-body holster strap, dark trousers
Klein Moretti.unique_identifier: always depicted with a long black overcoat draped cape-style revealing purple lining, brown leather cross-body holster strap; carries a silver chain with pure topaz pendulum in left sleeve; official image shows Chinese characters 克莱恩·莫雷蒂 (Klein Moretti)
Klein Moretti.wiki_source_notes: Image confirms: black hair, pale skin, purple-lined cape-style overcoat, brown leather cross-body strap, dark waistcoat over white shirt. Wiki corrects eye_color from black to brown (brown eyes confirmed in wiki appearance text and infobox lists both black and brown). Wiki adds full biographical details including species (Mythical Creature) and resurrection count. Current DB was largely accurate; main correction is eye color.

Melissa Moretti.skin_tone: pale, slightly thin-faced but with lustrous skin
Melissa Moretti.hair_style: long, reaching down her back; later tied up
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: grayish-white long dress that had been mended several times
Melissa Moretti.face_description: thin, slightly pale face with lustrous youthful skin; by 1352 her face filled out and lost its adolescent look; delicate features
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: Teenage girl with a thin, pale but lustrous face and black hair, wearing a simple dark skirt and blouse with a work apron, often carrying clockwork parts or a self-sewn school bag. Victorian-era attire in muted tones.
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.distinguishing_features: Frequently tinkers with gears, bearings, and springs; vocal advocate for women's education.
Melissa Moretti.faction: Tingen Technical School — Steam and Machinery department student
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Described wearing a new beige dress tailored by Mrs. Rochelle.
Melissa Moretti.unique_identifier: frugal aspiring mechanical engineer; brown eyes with a habitual expression of calm exasperation; tattered inherited veil cap and self-sewn school bag
Melissa Moretti.era_clothing_lock: entirely beige dress with fashionable engageantes, thin frills on the collar and edges, simple daily casual design
Melissa Moretti.wiki_source_notes: Wiki provided confirmed age progression (16→18→27), alias Zhou Sasa, detailed appearance evolution across years, and personality details (frugal, rational, aspiring mechanical engineer). Current DB was largely accurate; age_range expanded, build note added for 1352 change, face_description enriched from wiki text, full_name and codename added from infobox.

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: above-average looking, receding hairline, decrepit appearance, resembles Klein but lacks scholarly air
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male with receding black hair, brown eyes, worn appearance beyond his years, wearing working-class Victorian attire, later transitioning to civil servant dress
Benson Moretti.distinguishing_features: hard-working and plainspoken, genial and polite, literate, nominal head of Moretti family, defers to siblings' opinions due to their higher education
Benson Moretti.role: Deputy Director at Ministry of Finance (former dockworker)
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Mentioned drying his gradually receding hairline after a bath.
Benson Moretti.era_clothing_lock: linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.wiki_source_notes: Wiki infobox confirmed gender, hair_color (black), eye_color (brown), age 25 at debut. Appearance section confirmed receding hairline, decrepit look, resemblance to Klein. Updated faction to Ministry of Finance and role to Deputy Director per current occupation. Added full_name. Personality section enriched distinguishing_features.

Mrs. Rochelle.hair_style: hair tied in a practical, tight bun
Mrs. Rochelle.primary_clothing: Simple cotton house dress in a muted color with a dark, functional apron
Mrs. Rochelle.face_description: Kind and observant mature face, typical of a helpful neighbor in a communal living setting.
Mrs. Rochelle.visual_anchor: middle-aged woman in a simple house dress and apron, appearing as a helpful neighbor
Mrs. Rochelle.source_notes: Confirmed to be a seamstress who sews and mends clothes at home.

Selena.hair_style: long wavy, partially tied with a silk ribbon
Selena.face_description: Soft rounded face, youthful features, bright expressive eyes, and a small straight nose.
Selena.visual_anchor: 16-year-old slender girl with honey blonde wavy hair and hazel eyes, wearing a pale cream Victorian tea dress and a silk ribbon pearl choker.
Selena.color_palette: cream, lavender, pearl white, honey gold
Selena.source_notes: Age 16 confirmed; family background (solicitor brother, banker father) confirms middle-class status.
Selena.unique_identifier: wears a silk ribbon choker with a small pearl teardrop
Selena.era_clothing_lock: pale cream Victorian tea dress with lace collar, puffed sleeves, silk sash at the waist, and white lace gloves

Elizabeth.unique_identifier: always carries a small department store shopping bag with decorative ribbons
Elizabeth.era_clothing_lock: simple tailored walking dress with a modest bustle, long sleeves, and a small boater hat
Elizabeth.face_description: youthful face with soft, delicate features and an eager, bright expression
Elizabeth.visual_anchor: slender teenager with a youthful face and soft delicate features, always carrying a small department store shopping bag with decorative ribbons, wearing a simple tailored walking dress with a modest bustle and small boater hat
Elizabeth.source_notes: Mentioned as a friend who went shopping with Melissa; appearance guessed based on setting.

Mrs. Shaud.hair_style: swept up in a sophisticated pompadour style
Mrs. Shaud.face_description: Elegant high cheekbones, thin refined nose, and a composed, dignified expression.
Mrs. Shaud.visual_anchor: Mid-30s woman with auburn hair in a pompadour and grey eyes, wearing an emerald green Victorian walking suit and holding an ivory-handled lace parasol.
Mrs. Shaud.color_palette: emerald green, jet black, ivory, auburn
Mrs. Shaud.accessories: Ivory-handled parasol, tortoise shell calling card case
Mrs. Shaud.faction: Church of the Lord of Storms
Mrs. Shaud.source_notes: Updated with her social demeanor and religious/educational beliefs.
Mrs. Shaud.unique_identifier: always carries an ivory-handled parasol with intricate black lace trimming
Mrs. Shaud.era_clothing_lock: emerald green wool walking suit with black velvet lapels, a matching bonnet adorned with a small ostrich feather, and black leather gloves

Bitsch Mountbatten.hair_style: short with a full brown beard
Bitsch Mountbatten.primary_clothing: Black-and-white checkered Loen police uniform, peak cap with senior sergeant chevrons
Bitsch Mountbatten.face_description: Rough and brutal features, dominated by a thick brown beard and a stern, intimidating expression.
Bitsch Mountbatten.visual_anchor: Mid-40s male, stocky build, full brown beard, wearing a black-and-white checkered Loen police uniform and peak cap.
Bitsch Mountbatten.color_palette: charcoal black, stark white, earthy brown, silver
Bitsch Mountbatten.distinguishing_features: Slightly sharp voice with an Awwa accent
Bitsch Mountbatten.source_notes: Described as the street policeman with a brown beard and sharp voice.

Tris.primary_clothing: Simple linen shirt, dark vest, worn trousers
Tris.visual_anchor: A shy, unremarkable young man with a round, amiable face and soft features, wearing a simple Victorian wool waistcoat and flat cap.
Tris.color_palette: pale cream, light brown, muted grey
Tris.source_notes: Described by police as an 18 or 19-year-old boy with a rotund face.
Tris.unique_identifier: round, amiable face with an unmistakable shy expression; unremarkable boy who retreats to corners
Tris.era_clothing_lock: simple Victorian beige wool waistcoat, white cotton shirt, brown wool trousers, and a modest brown flat cap

Rozanne.face_description: smooth forehead, light-brown eyes, cheerful expression
Rozanne.visual_anchor: Early 20s brown-haired woman with a smooth forehead and light-brown eyes, wearing a light green Loen-style Victorian dress with beautiful lace detailing on sleeves, collar, and chest.
Rozanne.color_palette: light green, brown, white, soft cream
Rozanne.distinguishing_features: smooth forehead, cheerful and talkative personality
Rozanne.faction: Blackthorn Security Company (Church of the Evernight Goddess)
Rozanne.source_notes: Explicitly described as brown-haired and wearing a casual cream-colored dress.
Rozanne.era_clothing_lock: light green Victorian-style dress accentuated with beautiful lace on the sleeves, collar, and chest
Rozanne.wiki_source_notes: Wiki infobox confirmed gender, hair_color (brown), eye_color (light brown), age 22. Wiki appearance section confirmed smooth forehead (DB had 'bright'), light green Loen-style dress with lace on sleeves/collar/chest. Updated role from 'supporting' to 'receptionist' per wiki occupation. Added full_name from wiki aliases. Updated faction to include Church of Evernight Goddess affiliation.

Dunn Smith.hair_style: short, neatly combed back with a slight part, receding hairline
Dunn Smith.primary_clothing: white shirt, black vest, black trench coat, hat
Dunn Smith.face_description: Angular face with a strong jawline, straight nose, high cheekbones, deep-set gray eyes with a penetrating gaze; clean-shaven with a composed, slightly melancholic expression
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: Tall, lean man in his mid-thirties with short black hair and deep gray eyes, wearing a black double-breasted Victorian trench coat with epaulettes, holding a gold-handled walking cane
Dunn Smith.color_palette: black, dark charcoal, gold accents, white, pale skin
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: gray eyes described as deep and hidden in shadow; leads the Nighthawks; references Mandated Punishers, Machinery Hivemind, and other Judiciaries as peer organizations
Dunn Smith.accessories: gold-handled walking cane, chain accessory on coat, tie pin, black leather gloves
Dunn Smith.faction: Church of Evernight — Nighthawk Beyonder team
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Described having a deep pair of gray eyes and wearing his black trench coat.
Dunn Smith.unique_identifier: gold-handled walking cane and belted black trench coat with epaulettes
Dunn Smith.wiki_source_notes: Image (official art): black hair, pale skin, double-breasted black trench coat with epaulettes and belt, gold-handled cane, tie pin, chain on coat. Wiki infobox confirms hair_color as black (correcting DB's 'light brown' — wiki text says light brown but infobox says black; official image clearly shows black hair, so image+infobox win). Wiki confirms gray eyes, thirties age range, Nighthawk captain role. Appearance section's 'light brown hair' is overridden by both the official image and the infobox field showing black.

Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.face_description: deeply recessed wrinkles at the edges of eyes and mouth, dark red pupils slightly turbid, hoary appearance
Old Neil.visual_anchor: Hoary 61-year-old elder in a classic black robe with deeply wrinkled face and turbid dark red eyes; round glasses in donghua adaptation.
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: Deceased (corrupted by the Hidden Sage). Lives in a bungalow in North Borough suburbs; garden contains roses and gold mint; keeps a piano in memory of deceased fiancée Celeste. Known for being petty and stingy but fundamentally kind-hearted.
Old Neil.accessories: round felt hat; round glasses (donghua adaptation)
Old Neil.role: Mystery Pryer (Sequence 9, Hermit pathway); Clerk of Blackthorn Security Company
Old Neil.source_notes: Explicitly described his outfit in the chapter.
Old Neil.era_clothing_lock: classic black robe and felt black hat with a rounded edge
Old Neil.wiki_source_notes: Wiki infobox confirmed gender, hair (white), eyes (dark red), age 61. Appearance section confirmed classic black robe, deep wrinkles, turbid dark red pupils. Added full name Neil Townsend, round glasses from donghua, fiancée name Celeste, cause of death (Hidden Sage corruption), Hermit pathway detail, Blackthorn Security Company affiliation.
